summary: Finance Payment Ledger feature fully tested. Backend: All 14 API tests passed (pagination, filters, search, export, auth). Frontend: All UI elements working - ledger table with 11 transactions, status filters, search, export CSV, View Full Ledger navigation.

issues: Minor HTML hydration warnings for spans inside table elements - does not affect functionality

backend_ledger_endpoint.detail: GET /api/payments/ledger returns paginated payments with total, page, pages, limit fields

backend_ledger_export.detail: GET /api/payments/ledger/export returns all payments (11 records) for CSV

backend_ledger_auth.detail: Unauthenticated requests return 401, admin role has access

frontend_ledger_table.detail: Table shows Date, Customer, Amount, Commission, Net Vendor, Status, Reference columns with 11 payment rows

frontend_status_filters.detail: All 5 filter chips (All/Pending/Captured/Released/Failed) present and functional. Released filter shows 9 records.

frontend_search.detail: Search input and button work, filtering by 'Demo' updates results

frontend_export_csv.detail: Export CSV button triggers download with correct CSV headers

frontend_view_ledger_btn.detail: Finance Dashboard has 'View Full Ledger' button that navigates to /team/finance/ledger

frontend_sidebar_nav.detail: Finance role sidebar includes 'Payment Ledger' nav link (admin uses Payments link instead)

seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing 11 payment records (2 created, 9 released)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finance Ledger feature fully tested and working. 11 payment records exist with statuses: created (2), payment_released (9). Backend endpoints /api/payments/ledger and /api/payments/ledger/export work correctly with pagination, filters, and auth. All frontend elements have proper data-testid attributes. Minor HTML hydration warnings in console (span inside table elements) don't affect functionality.
